chapter_title.en: Punishment of intention of a sin

text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ بُکَیْرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْأَزْدِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: إِنَّ الْمُؤْمِنَ لَیَنْوِی الذَّنْبَ فَیُحْرَمُ رِزْقَهُ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ja’far b. Muhammad from Abdillah b. Bukayr b. Muhammad al-Azdi from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Surely whenever a believer intends to commit a sin, he is deprived of his sustenance.”
